title: Charcoal Smoked Turkish Lamb Kebabs
description: Savory and chewy Turkish lamb kebabs smoked to perfection with binchotan charcoal, featuring blueberries and served on a wooden board, this dish is a romantic and delicious treat for any occasion
instructions: Preheat the binchotan charcoal until it reaches a temperature of 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Place the skewers on the preheated binchotan charcoal and smoke for 10 minutes per side
While the lamb is cooking, mix the blueberries with a pinch of salt and a squeeze of lemon juice
Once the lamb is cooked, serve it on a wooden board with the blueberry mixture spooned over the top
Garnish with fresh parsley or thyme, if desired
